mapper.sql: id, run_id, step_id, checkpoint_key, stage, trigger_jsonb, settle_jsonb, state_jsonb, delta_jsonb, artifact_refs_jsonb, captured_at, duration_ms, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM checkpoint WHERE source_type = 'RUN' AND run_id = #{runId} ORDER BY captured_at ASC, created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO checkpoint ( id, source_type, run_id, step_id, checkpoint_key, stage, trigger_jsonb, settle_jsonb, state_jsonb, delta_jsonb, artifact_refs_jsonb, captured_at, duration_ms ) VALUES ( #{id}, 'RUN', #{runId}, #{stepId}, #{checkpointKey}, #{stage}, CAST(#{triggerJsonb} AS jsonb), CAST(#{settleJsonb} AS jsonb), CAST(#{stateJsonb} AS jsonb), CAST(#{deltaJsonb} AS jsonb), CAST(#{artifactRefsJsonb} AS jsonb), #{capturedAt}, #{durationMs} )
